description: Auto review reports an Effortlessly failure and the proposal addresses it by splitting an overloaded sentence.
document:
# Methods

The framework aligns feature spaces, calibrates predictions, and estimates uncertainty while preserving the original training objective.
instruction: Improve the methods sentence for a busy reviewer.

subagent_responses.independent reviewer:
## Care
Pass

## Understand
Pass

## Convinced
Pass

## Effortlessly
Fail - The sentence overloads the reader with too many operations at once; split the sequence.

input.task:
Evaluate this methods sentence for a busy reviewer:

The framework aligns feature spaces, calibrates predictions, and estimates uncertainty while preserving the original training objective.

input.title: Split overloaded method sentence
input.summary: Break the operation list into two sentences.

edits.old_text: The framework aligns feature spaces, calibrates predictions, and estimates uncertainty while preserving the original training objective.
edits.new_text: The framework aligns feature spaces and calibrates predictions. It then estimates uncertainty while preserving the original training objective.

model_script.text: Proposed a split sentence after reader review.

edit_new_text_contains: calibrates predictions. It then estimates uncertainty
